## Summary
- What changed?
- Why does this change matter?

## Validation
- [ ] `ruff check apps platform platform_connectors platform_observability packages scripts tests main.py`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] Showcase artifacts regenerated when applicable (`python scripts/run_showcase_demo.py`)

## Governance and docs
- [ ] Updated docs and release notes if behavior changed
- [ ] Updated contracts/tests if schemas or outputs changed

## Evidence
- Link screenshots, logs, or artifact references that help reviewers validate quickly.
